import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

# Tile and color constants
EMPTY = 0
FLOOR = 1
WALL = 2
BALL = 3
SQUARE = 4
PYRAMID = 5
GOAL = 6
KEY = 7
DOOR_LOCKED = 8
DOOR_CLOSED = 9
DOOR_OPEN = 10

YELLOW = 5
GREEN = 2

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Agent position and direction
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32) / (H_f - 1)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32) / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)

    # Yellow pyramid location on grid
    yp_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yp_count = jnp.sum(yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yp_y = jnp.sum(yy * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0) / (H_f - 1)
    yp_x = jnp.sum(xx * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0) / (W_f - 1)
    yp_present = jnp.clip(yp_count, 0.0, 1.0)  # 1 if on grid, 0 if picked up

    # Green square location on grid
    gs_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gs_count = jnp.sum(gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    gs_y = jnp.sum(yy * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0) / (H_f - 1)
    gs_x = jnp.sum(xx * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0) / (W_f - 1)
    gs_present = jnp.clip(gs_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Pocket info
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    holding_yellow_pyramid = jnp.float32(
        (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    )

    # Relative position: agent to yellow pyramid
    rel_yp_y = yp_y - agent_y  # normalized relative
    rel_yp_x = yp_x - agent_x

    # Relative position: agent to green square
    rel_gs_y = gs_y - agent_y
    rel_gs_x = gs_x - agent_x

    # Relative position: yellow pyramid to green square
    rel_yp_gs_y = yp_y - gs_y
    rel_yp_gs_x = yp_x - gs_x

    # Front tile info
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    front_is_yp = jnp.float32(
        (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == YELLOW)
    )
    front_is_floor = jnp.float32(state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == FLOOR)

    # Is yellow pyramid adjacent to green square? (success condition)
    # Check all 4 neighbors of green square
    gs_raw_y = jnp.sum(yy * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)
    gs_raw_x = jnp.sum(xx * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)
    yp_raw_y = jnp.sum(yy * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0)
    yp_raw_x = jnp.sum(xx * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0)
    manhattan_yp_gs = jnp.abs(yp_raw_y - gs_raw_y) + jnp.abs(yp_raw_x - gs_raw_x)
    adjacent = jnp.float32((manhattan_yp_gs <= 1.0) & (yp_count > 0) & (gs_count > 0))

    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 80.0

    obs = jnp.array([
        agent_y, agent_x,
        *dir_oh,
        yp_y, yp_x, yp_present,
        gs_y, gs_x, gs_present,
        pocket_tile, pocket_color,
        holding_yellow_pyramid,
        rel_yp_y, rel_yp_x,
        rel_gs_y, rel_gs_x,
        rel_yp_gs_y, rel_yp_gs_x,
        front_tile_id, front_tile_color,
        front_is_yp, front_is_floor,
        adjacent,
        step_norm,
    ], dtype=jnp.float32)

    return obs


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Yellow pyramid on grid
    def yp_pos(s):
        mask = (s.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (s.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Green square on grid
    def gs_pos(s):
        mask = (s.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (s.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    yp_y_cur, yp_x_cur, yp_count_cur = yp_pos(state)
    yp_y_next, yp_x_next, yp_count_next = yp_pos(next_state)
    gs_y_cur, gs_x_cur, gs_count_cur = gs_pos(state)
    gs_y_next, gs_x_next, gs_count_next = gs_pos(next_state)

    # Check adjacency: yellow pyramid placed adjacent to green square
    manhattan_cur = jnp.abs(yp_y_cur - gs_y_cur) + jnp.abs(yp_x_cur - gs_x_cur)
    manhattan_next = jnp.abs(yp_y_next - gs_y_next) + jnp.abs(yp_x_next - gs_x_next)

    # Success: yellow pyramid on grid and adjacent (distance == 1) to green square
    success_cur = (manhattan_cur <= 1.0) & (yp_count_cur > 0) & (gs_count_cur > 0)
    success_next = (manhattan_next <= 1.0) & (yp_count_next > 0) & (gs_count_next > 0)

    # Sparse success reward
    just_succeeded = (~success_cur) & success_next
    success_reward = jax.lax.select(just_succeeded, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Already succeeded (maintain)
    already_success = jax.lax.select(success_next, jnp.float32(0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Milestone: picked up yellow pyramid
    holding_cur = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_next = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    just_picked_up = (~holding_cur) & holding_next
    pickup_reward = jax.lax.select(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Dense shaping: when holding the pyramid, reward getting closer to green square
    agent_pos_cur = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_pos_next = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)

    dist_agent_to_gs_cur = jnp.abs(agent_pos_cur[0] - gs_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_pos_cur[1] - gs_x_cur)
    dist_agent_to_gs_next = jnp.abs(agent_pos_next[0] - gs_y_next) + jnp.abs(agent_pos_next[1] - gs_x_next)

    # When not holding: reward getting closer to yellow pyramid
    dist_agent_to_yp_cur = jnp.abs(agent_pos_cur[0] - yp_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_pos_cur[1] - yp_x_cur)
    dist_agent_to_yp_next = jnp.abs(agent_pos_next[0] - yp_y_next) + jnp.abs(agent_pos_next[1] - yp_x_next)

    approach_yp = (dist_agent_to_yp_cur - dist_agent_to_yp_next) * 0.05
    approach_gs = (dist_agent_to_gs_cur - dist_agent_to_gs_next) * 0.05

    # Use approach_yp when not holding, approach_gs when holding
    shaping = jnp.where(holding_next, approach_gs, approach_yp)
    # Only apply shaping when pyramid not yet placed adjacent
    shaping = jnp.where(success_next, jnp.float32(0.0), shaping)

    # Penalty for putting down pyramid far from green square
    just_put_down = holding_cur & (~holding_next) & (yp_count_next > 0)
    put_down_far = just_put_down & (~success_next)
    putdown_penalty = jax.lax.select(put_down_far, jnp.float32(-0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    total_reward = success_reward + already_success + pickup_reward + shaping + putdown_penalty

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
